name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Call `POST /api/v1/auth/...` with body `...`
2. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened, including error messages or response bodies.

## Environment
- UniAuth version: [e.g. v0.1.0]
- Go version: [e.g. 1.24]
- PostgreSQL version: [e.g. 16]
- Redis version: [e.g. 7]
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Deployment: [Docker / Kubernetes / bare metal]

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here (logs, stack traces, etc.)
